title: Play Time
description: Track how long players spend on your server and celebrate milestones with rewards
body:
## ⏱️ Play Time

Track how long players spend on your server and celebrate milestones with rewards.

### ✨ Features
- Player time tracking in DD:HH:MM format
- `/playtime` and `/pt` to show your time
- `/playtime leaderboard` or `/playtime top` for Top 10 + your rank
- Action bar notifications when rewards are ready to claim
- Playtime rewards with any items from GUI (vanilla, ItemAdder, Oraxen)
- ItemAdder and Oraxen item support
- PlaceholderAPI placeholders for time, rank, and top list
- Fully configurable messages and formats

### 🧭 Commands
- `/playtime` — show your play time
- `/playtime <player>` — show another player's time
- `/playtime leaderboard` — show Top 10 leaderboard
- `/playtime reward claim` — claim ready rewards
- `/playtime reward add <name> <time>` — create reward and open GUI (admin)
- `/playtime reward edit <name>` — edit reward GUI (admin)
- `/playtime reward list` — list rewards (admin)
- `/playtime reset <player>` — reset player time (admin)
- `/playtime set <player> <time>` — set player time (admin)

### 🔐 Permissions
- `playtime.admin.reset`
- `playtime.admin.set`
- `playtime.admin.notify`

### 🧩 Placeholders
Use with PlaceholderAPI:
- `%playtime_time%`
- `%playtime_time_seconds%`
- `%playtime_rank%`
- `%playtime_top_1_name%` ... `%playtime_top_10_name%`
- `%playtime_top_1_time%` ... `%playtime_top_10_time%`

### 🎁 Rewards
Rewards are edited through an in-game GUI and can contain any items,
including potions, enchantments, ItemAdder, and Oraxen items.

### ⚙️ Compatibility
- Built for Paper 1.21.x
- Works on lower Paper versions as long as the server runs Java 17+

---

### Support:
-  on [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sD4HvQh8P4)
